title: Character video-capture manifest (manga pose-bank supply)
description: One manifest per character × outfit. Compiles demanded pose_ids into short identity-anchored video clips for frame harvest into the image bank. Authority: docs/specs/MANGA_VIDEO_POSE_BANK_SUPPLY_SPEC.md. Consumed by Lane 04 scripts/manga/video_bank/ compiler + capture runner. Extracted still layers remain ordinary L2/L3 assembly_manifest assets; motion-source artifacts (clips, contact sheets) claim A0–A9 per MANGA_LAYER_RENDER_CONTRACT_SPEC §4.6 / §19.

identity_version.description: Identity lock revision (PuLID sheet hash / model_sheet version). All clips in this manifest share this version.

outfit_id.description: Outfit key; must match character_design / inventory outfit vocabulary.

mode.description: rollup when manga-bank-demand-rollup-merged exists; else per-episode bank_contracts + series master plan golden.

asset_path.description: Repo-relative path to canonical still (PuLID reference / model_sheet / Pearl Star Qwen-Image render). Cloud still-quota MUST NOT be spent on anchors.

public_url.description: Stable public URL or data URI for i2v first_frame / media[] (Lane 02 DOC-CONFIRMED).

source_class.description: Existing identity machinery only — never DashScope still-quota.

engine_lane.description: Pilot default dashscope_free_i2v; scale pearl_star_vace. r2v only when free seconds proven.

planned_seconds.description: Sum of capture_sets duration_s for this burn plan.

reserve_seconds.description: Retake reserve; pack default ≥10s for free-quota pilot.

sunset_date.description: ISO date; free-media exception hard stop 2026-10-18.

provenance_default.description: Q-VBANK-03: DashScope-derived = INTERIM permanently; Apache Wan/VACE self-host = REAL-eligible after full gate chain (still stamped REAL only post-gates).

family.description: Action family. One short clip per family entry; curation selects smallest sufficient pose set.

clip_id.description: Unique within manifest; maps to A-namespace motion artifact id when registered.

prompt.description: Comic-readable key-pose clip prompt: staged anticipation/impact/follow-through, locked camera, full body in frame, flat neutral high-contrast background, single character, no props unless demanded.

duration_s.description: Pilot recipe prefers 5s; i2v API allows 2–15 integer seconds.

engine.description: Model id, e.g. wan2.7-i2v or local VACE-1.3B workflow tag.

anchor_mode.description: Pilot = i2v from same anchor; r2v deferred unless free seconds proven; vace = Pearl Star scale; t2v = smoke only.

demanded_pose_ids.description: Only DEMANDED pose_ids drive clips and curation. §6.8 / continuity §8 cardinality applies: never keep all frames.

a_namespace_id.description: Optional reserved animation-namespace claim for the motion-source artifact (clip/contact sheet).

candidate_keyed_samples.description: Lane 02: 8–12 keyed samples for 5s clip (not uniform stride).

bank_keep_target.description: Lane 02: 4–6 banked cutouts after QA for 5s clip.
